_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communicating between the technical and non-technical involves conveying information using the most effective medium and language for the audience.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.558), AI-S-004 (AI, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.655). Shared vocabulary: [communicating, non, technical]. DDaT-only terms [audience, conveying, effective, information, involves, language] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, briefing, conference, findings, formats, internal] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.894, R=0.882). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Communicating between the technical and non-technical involves conveying informa" and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.662 ≈ STS 0.655 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [communicating, non, technical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [communicating, non, technical]. DDaT-only: [audience, conveying, effective, information, involves, language]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, briefing, conference, findings, formats, internal].
